personal.description: Review your account, display, notifications, and security settings in one place.
personal.card1Body: Manage your name and account details.
personal.card2Body: Adjust theme, language, and regional display.
personal.card3Body: Check login, connected accounts, and notification rules.

aiTools.description: Manage personal API keys, Deep Research, agent tools, and MCP server connections.
aiTools.card1Body: Add a Gemini API key to use premium AI features on your own billing.
aiTools.card2Body: Manage external tool tokens for workspace and personal spaces.
aiTools.card3Body: Managed models are tracked through credit charges and LLM usage events.

workspace.description: Manage members, invites, integrations, shared links, and trash for the current workspace.
workspace.card2Body: Manage workspace connections such as Google Drive.
workspace.card3Body: Check shared links and deleted-note retention.

billing.description: Review plan, credits, and managed AI usage paths.
billing.card1Body: Check the current plan and available features.
billing.card2Body: Track the balance used for managed AI calls.
billing.card3Body: Features using personal keys are separated onto user billing.

members.heading: Members
members.ownerLocked: Owner cannot be changed or removed.

trash.heading: Trash
trash.retention: Deleted notes are kept for 30 days, then permanently deleted automatically.
trash.emptyAllConfirm: Permanently delete {count} notes from trash? This cannot be undone.
